description: Cut a stable release from the current `main` branch so users have a known-good target before wider observational memory work lands. Determine the appropriate next version/tag, verify repo state on main, create the git tag, publish the GitHub release, and capture the resulting release/tag info in beadwork history.

comments.text:
Created annotated tag `v0.1.0` from `main` at `79968b321df871c2705707016cc2fb4831861749` and published the GitHub release: https://github.com/bkono/sbd-pi-extensions/releases/tag/v0.1.0

Release notes frame this as the stable baseline before the next round of observational-memory workflow changes.

title: Tag current main and create a GitHub release before observational memory changes
